name: AMS-Gruppe
message: AMS is a leasing company that cooperates with other lessors in the area of car leasing (“double-deck leasing”) in order to promote the mobility change with new leasing concepts. We advise you in questions concerning company mobility and salary conversion or motivation leasing. The contract solution we have developed for cars, bicycles, e-bikes as well as IT equipment including tablets and smartphones simplifies motivation leasing because we divide the rights and obligations of a lessee between employer and employee.
